_audiences_comment: optional: define custom + lookalike audiences once here. deploy.py creates them before any adset so targeting.custom_audiences can reference them by name. supported types: custom_list (hashed csv), pixel (website retargeting), engagement (page/post/IG/video), lookalike (needs seed + country). drop this block entirely if you don't use audiences.

audiences.name: adforge-demo-visitors-90d
audiences.description: everyone who visited the site in the last 90 days

targeting._comment: write interests/work_positions/industries/behaviors as free-form strings — `resolve.py` turns them into {id, name, audience_size} objects before deploy. custom_audiences / excluded_custom_audiences can reference plan.audiences entries by name (or pasted {id, name} objects).

ads.name: adforge-demo-core-AT-advertorial-4x5
ads.primary_text: The primary text lives here — short, plain, concrete.
ads.headline: Short headline

ads.name: adforge-demo-core-AT-advertorial-9x16
ads.primary_text: The primary text lives here — short, plain, concrete.
ads.headline: Short headline
